regular.d: Returns the latest block.
Returns connected node info.
Returns the node's syncing state.
Returns the block at the given height — replace {height} with a recent height (see /blocks/latest). Old heights need an archive node.
Returns all validators.
Returns total coin supply.
Returns all balances of the given address.

archive.d: Historical block — requires an archive node.

regular.d: Subscribe to events over WebSocket (e.g. new blocks).
Unsubscribe from a WebSocket event query.
Returns node status: node info, sync info, validator info.
Returns node health — empty result means healthy.
Returns ABCI application data.
Returns active peer network info.
Returns the block at the given height (latest when omitted).
Returns execution results for the block at the given height.
Returns block headers for a height range.
Returns the genesis document.
Returns the validator set at the given height.
Returns a snapshot of the consensus state.
Returns the number of unconfirmed transactions.

archive.d: Historical block — requires an archive node.

regular.d: Returns the latest block number.
Returns the chain ID of the current network.
Returns the Ether balance of an address in wei.
Returns block info for a given block number.
Returns a transaction matching the given hash — paste a tx hash from this chain.
Returns the receipt of a transaction by hash — paste a tx hash from this chain.
Returns the number of transactions sent from an address.
Returns the current gas price in wei.
Returns the current max priority fee per gas in wei.
Returns historical gas fee data.
Estimates the gas needed for a transaction.
Executes a read-only call — great for reading contract state (e.g. ERC-20 totalSupply).
Returns logs matching a given filter object.
Returns the bytecode at a given address.
Returns the value from a storage position at an address.
Returns sync status, or false when in sync.
Returns the current network ID as a string.
Returns the current client version string.
Subscribe to new block headers over WebSocket.
Cancel a WebSocket subscription by id.

Returns the lamport balance of the account at the provided pubkey.
Returns the current block height of the node.
Returns identity and transaction information about a confirmed block — pass a recent slot (get one with getSlot), e.g. [SLOT, {"maxSupportedTransactionVersion":0}].
Returns transaction details for a confirmed transaction — paste a recent tx signature, e.g. ["SIGNATURE", {"maxSupportedTransactionVersion":0}].
Returns all information associated with the account.
Returns information about the current epoch.
Returns the health of the node.
Returns the software version of the node.
Returns the latest block.
Returns connected node info.
Returns the node's syncing state.
Returns the block at the given height — replace {height} with a recent height (see /blocks/latest). Old heights need an archive node.
Returns all validators.
Returns total coin supply.
Returns all balances of the given address.

archive.d: Historical block — requires an archive node.

regular.d: Subscribe to events over WebSocket (e.g. new blocks).
Unsubscribe from a WebSocket event query.
Returns node status: node info, sync info, validator info.
Returns node health — empty result means healthy.
Returns ABCI application data.
Returns active peer network info.
Returns the block at the given height (latest when omitted).
Returns execution results for the block at the given height.
Returns block headers for a height range.
Returns the genesis document.
Returns the validator set at the given height.
Returns a snapshot of the consensus state.
Returns the number of unconfirmed transactions.

regular.d: Returns the latest block number.
Returns the chain ID of the current network.
Returns the Ether balance of an address in wei.
Returns block info for a given block number.
Returns a transaction matching the given hash — paste a tx hash from this chain.
Returns the receipt of a transaction by hash — paste a tx hash from this chain.
Returns the number of transactions sent from an address.
Returns the current gas price in wei.
Returns the current max priority fee per gas in wei.
Returns historical gas fee data.
Estimates the gas needed for a transaction.
Executes a read-only call — great for reading contract state (e.g. ERC-20 totalSupply).
Returns logs matching a given filter object.
Returns the bytecode at a given address.
Returns the value from a storage position at an address.
Returns sync status, or false when in sync.
Returns the current network ID as a string.
Returns the current client version string.
Subscribe to new block headers over WebSocket.
Cancel a WebSocket subscription by id.

Traces every transaction in a block by number.
Traces every transaction in a block by hash.
Traces an eth_call without creating a transaction.

trace.d: Returns traces created at the given block.
Returns all traces of the given transaction.
Replays all transactions in a block, returning the requested traces.
Returns traces matching the given filter.
Executes a call and returns the requested traces.
